query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: A bedroom interior viewed through a wooden door frame. At the center, a figure lies on a bed beneath blankets and pillows. In the foreground on the bed, a lit candle stands on a round cushion. Behind the bed, a window covered with sheer curtains allows light to filter into the room. To the left of the bed, a small table holds a plastic bottle and other items. Wood paneling lines the door frame and walls.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A melancholic bedroom scene viewed through a wooden doorway, rendered in muted, desaturated warm tones with a suffocating low-contrast atmosphere. A figure lies on a bed beneath blankets, nearly swallowed by darkness, while a single candle provides the primary illumination from a cushion in the foreground. Behind them, sheer curtains diffuse pale light through a window, yet the room remains oppressively underexposed with crushed shadows and weak tonal separation, evoking a sense of depression and unease.
